xtce:Parameter.name: PEV__LOG_SLICE_HDR
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Slice index when the event was logged"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEV__MEM_CURR_BYTES
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Running count of bytes processed in current operation"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEV__DES_LAST_OVERRUN
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Last task ID to overrun its allocation"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEV__DES_EFF_TIME_SEC
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Time at which new time becomes effective"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEV__DES_MET_VTC_SET_TIME
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Last MET time the VTC was set"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEV__DES_CPU_USAGE
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Percent CPU usage for last completed cycle"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEV__PL_TIME_CNT_LWC
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Number of time messages sent to payload"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEV__PL_STAT_CNT_LWC
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Number of status messages sent to payload"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEV__PL_ALIVE_TH_LWC
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Number of seconds to check for aliveness"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEV__PL_CRIT_TIME_LWC
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Time when critical data section was updated"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEV__AXIS_MTR_CMD_CNT_RSM
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Count of motor commands from Axis controller"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEV__AXIS_EN_MRG0_RSM
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Encoder mergeEncoder merge margin, invalid during initial cal, 6 bits"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEV__AXIS_EN_MRG1_RSM
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Encoder merge margin, invalid during initial cal, 6 bits"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEV__AXIS_EN_MRG2_RSM
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Encoder merge margin, invalid during initial cal, 6 bits"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEV__AXIS_EN_IS_CAL_RSM
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Zero if encoder cal required, otherwise cal data is valid"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEV__AXIS_EN_CAL_STAT_RSM
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Encoder cal in progress, succeeded, or failed/aborted, 2 bits"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEV__AXIS_EN_RSVD_RSM
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Reserved encoder field, no datasheet info, 1 bit"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEV__AXIS_EN_ERR_FREE_RSM
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Counter for encoder responses showing no errors"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEV__AXIS_EN_ERR_DIG_RSM
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Counter for encoder encoder readhead digital faults"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEV__AXIS_EN_ERR_CSEC_RSM
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Counter for consecutive encoder responses with errors"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEV__AXIS_EN_FRA_CSEC_RSM
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Counter for consecutive encoder frames with errors"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEV__AXIS_MTR_CMD_CNT_SD
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Count of motor commands from Axis controller"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEV__AXIS_EN_MRG0_SD
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Encoder mergeEncoder merge margin, invalid during initial cal, 6 bits"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEV__AXIS_EN_MRG1_SD
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Encoder merge margin, invalid during initial cal, 6 bits"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEV__AXIS_EN_MRG2_SD
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Encoder merge margin, invalid during initial cal, 6 bits"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEV__AXIS_EN_IS_CAL_SD
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Zero if encoder cal required, otherwise cal data is valid"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEV__AXIS_EN_CAL_STAT_SD
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Encoder cal in progress, succeeded, or failed/aborted, 2 bits"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEV__AXIS_EN_RSVD_SD
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Reserved encoder field, no datasheet info, 1 bit"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEV__AXIS_EN_ERR_FREE_SD
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Counter for encoder responses showing no errors"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEV__AXIS_EN_ERR_DIG_SD
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Counter for encoder encoder readhead digital faults"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEV__AXIS_EN_ERR_CSEC_SD
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Counter for consecutive encoder responses with errors"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEV__AXIS_EN_FRA_CSEC_SD
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Counter for consecutive encoder frames with errors"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEV__LWC_ERR_NO_TOD
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "LWC No TOD received between last two PPS"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEV__LWC_ERR_RX_CRC
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "LWC Calculated CRC did not match received CRC"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEV__LWC_ERR_RX_LONG
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "LWC Received more data than specified in length"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEV__LWC_ERR_RX_SHORT
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "LWC Received less data than specified in length"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEV__LWC_ERR_RX_LEN
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "LWC Invalid length field for ApID in command"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEV__LWC_ERR_DIV_BY_0
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "LWC Division by 0 error during Rt calculation"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEV__LWC_HTR_SETPOINT
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "LWC Heater Setpoint, Ohms relative to 100-Ohm PRT"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEV__LWC_HTR_PWM
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "LWC Open Loop pulse width modulation value, in percent"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEV__LWC_HTR_PWM_ADJUST
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "LWC Heater PWM Adjust, including sign bit"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEV__LWC_HTR_PWM_DUTY
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "LWC Heater PWM Duty Cycle value, including sign bit"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEV__STEP_LAST_RATE
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Last commanded step rate, rounded to nearest integer"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEV__STEP_TOT_CNT
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Total count of stepper motor steps since POR or reset command"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEV__STEP_HALL_RAW
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Raw motor position according to Hall Sensors"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEV__STEP_HALL_POS
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Converted motor position according to Hall Sensors"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEV__STEP_HALL_VOTE_ERR
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Number of non-unanimous Hall Sensor votes (both sensors combined)"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEV__STEP_HALL_TRANS1
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Step number at first transition (moving towards open)"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEV__STEP_HALL_TRANS2
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Step number at second transition (moving towards open)"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEV__STEP_HALL_TRANS3
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Step number at third transition (moving towards open)"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEV__STEP_HALL_TRANS4
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Step number at fourth transition (moving towards open), if exists"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEV__STEP_CYC_START_TM
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Duty cycle start time, in MET seconds"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEV__STEP_CYC_TRANS_TM
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Time of next open/close duty cycling transition, in MET seconds"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEV__STEP_CYC_OPEN_TM
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Last commanded open time when cycling, in ms"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEV__STEP_CYC_CLOSE_TM
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Last commanded closed time when cycling, in ms"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEV__STEP_CYC_OPEN_MEAS
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Last measured time in shutter open position when cycling, in ms"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEV__STEP_CYC_CLOSE_MEAS
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Last measured time in shutter closed position when cycling, in ms"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEV__STEP_CYC_PPS_DIFF
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Measured millisecs after PPS to start open/close cycle movement"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEV__STEP_CYC_NOT_OP_CNT
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Counter for Hall sensors should read open but do not during cycling"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEV__STEP_CYC_NOT_CL_CNT
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Counter for Hall sensors should read closed but do not during cycling"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEV__BD_PASS
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Board I/O passivated due to ID mismatch"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEV__MSG_RCV_SEC
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Local time in seconds when the last time message was received"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEV__MSG_RCV_SUB
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Local time in subsecond when the last time message was received"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEV__PPS_RCV_SEC
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Local time in seconds when the last time pulse was received"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEV__PPS_RCV_SUB
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Local time in subseconds when the last time pulse was received"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEV__TIME_UP_CNT
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Number of time updates that have been performed"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEV__TIME_SINCE_MSG
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Time in seconds since the last message."

xtce:Parameter.name: PEV__TIME_SINCE_UP
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Time in seconds since the last time sync."

xtce:Parameter.name: PEV__TIME_SYNC_MAX
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Max Number of seconds between time sync (PPS) since reset"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEV__TIME_SYNC_MIN
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Min Number of seconds between time sync (PPS) since reset"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEV__SW_BD_PASS
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Board I/O passivated due to ID mismatch"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEV__SW_HALL_POS
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Derived motor position according to Hall Sensors"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEV__SW_AXIS_EN_CSEC_RSM
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Counter for consecutive encoder responses with errors"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEV__SW_AXIS_EN_CSEC_SD
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Counter for consecutive encoder responses with errors"

xtce:SequenceContainer.name: CCSDSPacket
xtce:SequenceContainer.xtce:LongDescription: Super-container for telemetry and command packets
